title: sorghum × hewisonii
intro: Sorghum × hewisonii is a hybrid plant, which is a cross between the sorghum bicolor and the sorgum × almum plants. It is also known as the broom corn, which is a type of grass that has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. The sorghum × hewisonii plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as fever, skin irritations, and infections. It can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
